items.name_en: [Best Seller Large] 🆕 In Stock Red
items.name_cn:
[Best Seller Large] 🆕 In Stock Red
Neo Cagole New Motorcycle Bag 💋
Paris's new motorcycle bag reshapes the classic bag shape, injecting new soul into the 'motorcycle bag'. Made of top-tier Italian imported cracked leather, retaining the original DNA of the classic motorcycle bag with flat rivets, exquisite buckles, and tassel zippers, while adding adjustable woven straps and cute playful heart-shaped mirrors, perfectly softening the original unisex temperament 👍🏻, 🧐 Retro trend is back, the favorite of fashionistas 👄
Dimensions: 38*17*24cm

 Neo Cagole New Motorcycle Bag 💋
Parisian brand's new motorcycle bag, reshaping the classic silhouette and infusing new soul into the 'motorcycle bag'. Crafted from top-tier imported Italian bursting sheepskin, it retains the original DNA of classic motorcycle bags with flat rivets, exquisite buckles, and fringe zippers. It adds adjustable woven shoulder straps and a cute playful heart-shaped mirror, perfectly softening the original unisex temperament. 🧐 Vintage revival, a favorite among fashionistas. 👄 Size: 38*17*24cm

items.name_en: Celine Triomphe new chain shoulder bag, instantly fell in love with the runway look, love the Triomphe + chain design, black and gold is so beautiful in person! Super exquisite! New capacity is much larger than the old version, and a bit heavier, but I personally like the feeling of it resting on the shoulder for a more textured look. Anyway, absolutely love it, sisters who want it should grab it quickly! Size: 30cm
